// note: ignoreDeprecations is 6.0 here because this app resolves its own TypeScript 6.0.x (via `typescript: *`), which needs 6.0 to silence the inherited moduleResolution=node10 deprecation. The packages build under the root's pinned TS 5.9.3 which needs 5.0 (tsconfig.base.json). Unify the monorepo TS version to drop this split.
